text:
Im pregnant, and i'm building a pregnancy app

my goal is to reach 100,000 users 
before my baby meets the world.

I want my APP to help moms navigate 
their pregnancy while still being productive. 

so today is my first day building in public 

if you have any advice for me,

Writing code is easy. Making people care isn’t

FOCUS ON MARKETING

This is wild!! 
Mental health apps making $100k+/mo

You can build one with Cursor + React Native

Reach out to mindset and wellness creators (they post every day for free content)

Close 3–5 influencers for $1/1000 views

They share your app in “how I manage anxiety” or “daily

This is just crazy!! 
Budget apps are printing $100k/mo

They’re super simple to build
In 48 hours with Cursor + Flutter

Email 2,000 finance creators (huge engaged niche)

Close 3–6 influencers for $1/1000 views

they feature your app in “how I save money” videos
and it just

This is insane!! 
Workout apps making $120k+/mo

You can build one  with Cursor + React Native

Reach out to fitness creators (one of the most loyal niches)

If you dont want to do it pay your younger sibling $10/day to do it (he is scrolling anyways)

its day 15 of building in public
